title: IHF GAD67+ NeuN
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"8m34p","text":"This is a double immunofluorescent staining method for GAD67 and NeuN in rat brain sections. This method is used to identify and quantify GABAergic neurons in relation to the total neuronal population. GAD67 (67kDa glutamate decarboxylase) is a specific marker for GABAergic inhibitory neurons, and NeuN is a pan-neuronal marker used to identify mature neurons.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"fojk","text":"This protocol is optimised for cryosections of 30 µm-thick rat brains that have been fixed in PFA and cryoprotected in 30% sucrose prior to embedding in OCT.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"aust3","text":"To succeed in this protocol, you need to have prior knowledge of the techniques involved in free flotation and immunohistochemistry, as well as knowing how to proceed. If you do not yet have the necessary experience, seek expert advice to learn the technical details.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a0heh","text":"Good luck!","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"8kjbj","text":"DAPI is potentially mutagenic","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bs56f","text":"Use laboratory coat and globes. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"b3p24","text":"It is important that the tissue is not folded during the process, since this improves the antigen-antibody bond.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1kc0v","text":"The order of the primary antibodies is extremely relevant: 1st GAD67, 2nd NeuN. Switching the order increases background noise and cross-talking between antibodies, making it difficult to differentiate and count cells. Furthermore, it is also important to select secondary antibodies with wavelengths that are as far as possible, again to facilitate the optimal differentiation between cells. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text:
{"blocks":[{"key":"50ofk","text":"Materials","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5rike","text":"**EQUIPMENT**
- Multiwell 24 plate
- ThermoMixer
- 2ml microtubes
- Black tray
- Aluminum foil
- Tweezers


**CHEMICALS**
- Tri-sodium citrate Ref S4641
- PBS 1x
- Triton X-100 Ref: X100","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2c2uf","text":"- Tween20  Ref: P7949
- Goat Serum Ref: S26-M Sigma (GS)
- DAPI Ref: D9542
- VECTASHIELD‱ HardSet‱ Ref H-1400


**BUFFERS**
- Sodium Citrate Buffer (10mM Sodium Citrate + 0.05% Tween20 pH6)
- Wash buffer (Wb) PBS-Tx (PBS 1x + 0.5% Triton)
- Blocking Buffer (Wb + 5% GS)
- Antibody Diluent (Wb + 2.5% GS)


**ANTIBODIES**
- NeuN Merck MAB377 1/1000
- GAD67 Merck Ref. MAB5406

- Anti-Mouse 488 ThermoFisher Alexa Fluor‱ 488 A-11029 1/500
- Anti-Mouse 647 ThermoFisher Alexa Fluor‱ 647 A21236 1/500


**PROTECTIVE GEAR**
- Laboratory Coat
- Gloves","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":88,"length":1},{"key":1,"offset":97,"length":1},{"key":2,"offset":417,"length":1},{"key":3,"offset":478,"length":1}],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"emoji","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"D9339237F85611F0A2260A58A9FEAC02","name":":registered:"}},"1":{"type":"emoji","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"D93391C0F85611F0A2260A58A9FEAC02","name":":tm:"}},"2":{"type":"emoji","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"D9339202F85611F0A2260A58A9FEAC02","name":":tm:"}},"3":{"type":"emoji","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"D933921AF85611F0A2260A58A9FEAC02","name":":tm:"}}}}
steps: Select the slices to be performed and place one slice and citrate into 2 ml tubes. Place one slice in each tube and ensure they are completely submerged.
Remove GAD67 antibody
Add 500 μl/well of blocking Buffer 2 hours at RT with gentle shaking
Remove primary antibody
Remove Secondary antibody
Place around 3 slices/well on multi-well plate and wash with 500 ul wash buffer (Wb) 3 times x 5 min each. Kindly ensure that all the tissue in the well is thoroughly covered.
Place the tubes in the thermoblock at 80ºC for 20 minutes. Shaking gently is not compulsory.
Remove the blocking buffer
Add 500 μl/well of the primary antibody to each well and incubate at 4 °C with gentle shaking overweekend
Prepare primary antibody dilution GAD67 1/500 in antibody diluent
Add 500 μl/well of the secondary antibody to each well and incubate at RT with gentle shaking for 2 hours.
Add 500 μl/well Wb and shaking incubation for 5 min and remove buffer (Repeat this step minimum 3 times)
Prepare secondary antibody dilution Anti- Mouse 488 1/500
Remove the Wb
Prepare primary antibody dilution NeuN 1/1000 in antibody diluent
Add 500 μl/well of the primary antibody to each well and incubate at 4 °C with gentle shaking overweekend
Remove secondary antibody
Add 500 µl/well Wb and shaking incubation for 5 min and remove buffer (Repeat this step minimum 3 times).
Put the cover slide in a dark box and leave it to dry
Add 500 µl/well Wb and shaking incubation for 5 min and remove buffer (Repeat this step minimum 3 times).
Add 500 μl/well of the secondary antibody to each well and incubate at RT with gentle shaking
Prepare secondary antibody dilution Anti- Mouse 647 1/500
Add 500 µl/well Wb and shaking incubation for 5 min and remove buffer (Repeat this step minimum 3 times)
Remove DAPI
Add 500 µl/well of the DAPI to each well and incubate at RT with gentle shaking for 5 minutes
Add 500 µl/well Wb and shaking incubation for 5 min and remove buffer (Repeat this step minimum 3 times)
20 You have your slices ready for the microscope
Bring the VECTASHIELD‱ HardSet‱ to room temperature
Mount the slices on the slides. Cover with approximately 50 µl of VECTASHIELD‱ HardSet‱ per slice
creator: Aroa S Maroto
